subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-18
subcodes.first_line: If the fruit of the existence of man is not servitude at the threshold of the Almighty I declare by the living, self-subsistent God
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @effort; striving, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @humility; meekness; lowliness
